certificates.name: nfb.claim4_distinctness_toy
certificates.object: deep-hole c_A(a) family at F_17^2: #distinct{c_A(a)} >= CS25 Claim-4 bound L(q-n)/(q-n+(L-1)k); every counted F\B slope is a verified same-set failure
certificates.reproducibility: deep-hole line N_FB certificate at F_17^2, z0=0, a=theta
certificates.supports: deployed-lift obligation (2): CS25 Claim 4 / distinct-evaluation boundary

certificates.name: nfb.lemma4_nonbase_toy
certificates.object: Base-coefficient non-base lemma at F_17^2, exhaustive over the fiber: every c_A is nonconstant and each c_A in B[X] has #{a in F : c_A(a) in B} <= p*k; hence avg_{a in F\B} #{A:c_A(a) in B} <= |fiber|*p*k/(q-p).
certificates.reproducibility: all fiber elements checked: #constant c_A==0; max_A #{a in F:c_A(a) in B} <= p*k; avg_{F\B} <= mu

certificates.name: nfb.deployed_lowerbound
certificates.notes: Proof-composition given imports: (1) heavy-fiber lower bound, (2) CS25 Claim 4, and (3) the base-coefficient non-base lemma. Margin is about one bit.
certificates.object: KoalaBear^6: F\B N_FB lower bound avg_{a in F\B}[N_FB] >= 1/c0' - mu, averaged over the deep-hole set F\B (|F\B|=q-p), clears cap target (q-n)/2k; all c_A nonconstant since ell nmid N (z0=0).
certificates.supports: cor:Fvalued deployed-density arithmetic companion, conditional on imported heavy-fiber and CS25 collision inputs

title: Deep-hole per-line F\B density: deployed-lift certificate
